# QLThumbnailError.Code.requestCancelled

**Case**

The request to create a thumbnail was canceled.

## Declaration

```swift
case requestCancelled
```

## Discussion

An app canceled a request to create a thumbnail using QLThumbnailGenerator’s [doc://com.apple.quicklookthumbnailing/documentation/QuickLookThumbnailing/QLThumbnailGenerator/cancel(_:)] method.

## Error Codes

- **QLThumbnailError.Code.generationFailed**: The thumbnail couldn’t be created for the given file.
- **QLThumbnailError.Code.noCachedThumbnail**: A low-quality thumbnail couldn’t be created.
- **QLThumbnailError.Code.noCloudThumbnail**: The thumbnail for a remote file couldn’t be created.
- **QLThumbnailError.Code.requestInvalid**: The request to create a thumbnail was invalid, for example, there’s no file at a provided URL.
- **QLThumbnailError.Code.savingToURLFailed**: The thumbnail couldn’t be saved at the given URL.
